purpose: Present key numbers and essential facts in scannable bullet form — giving readers the critical data at a glance.
writingRules: Each fact must be one line — no more than 20 words
Include source for every fact (inline or via numbered reference)
Maximum 8 facts — prioritise the most impactful
Facts should be surprising or counter-intuitive where possible
Numbers must use consistent formatting (₹, %, Cr, etc.)
seoRules: Bullet points eligible for featured snippet
Key numbers should use schema.org StatisticalPopulation where applicable
Each bullet should start with a strong keyword
